title: Centralized Credit Management Workflow
description: A workflow solution designed to automate and streamline the credit facility initiation and approval process with real-time notifications and status updates.

title: Complaint Management System
description: A Microsoft Power Platform-based system for collecting customer complaints through call centers and branches, then routing them to relevant departments with notifications and status updates.

title: EduSphere School LMS
role: API Gateway, Identity Service, Homework & Assessment Service Developer
description: A microservices-based school LMS developed by a 6-member team, supporting authentication, service routing, and assignment management.

title: Brain Tumor Classification
description: A custom CNN baseline model for classifying brain tumor MRI images into four categories using TensorFlow/Keras.
